mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session (session_id, user_id, target_id, unread_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{targetId}, #{unreadCount}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE (user_id = #{userId} AND target_id = #{targetId}) OR (user_id = #{targetId} AND target_id = #{userId}) LIMIT 1
